subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and firm in the Covenant and Testament! By the Ancient of Days and the Most Great Name, I swear that the dwellers of the sanctified pavilion in the celestial gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ بر عهد و میثاق قسم بر قدیم و اسم عظیم که اهل سرادق قدس در حدائق
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
